name: vlds
description: VLDS — a standalone, runtime epistemic layer distilled from the P4 framework: a user-controlled dashboard for a model's own epistemics. Two instruments. The gate routes a load-bearing claim through VERIFIABLE → VERIFIED → CONFIRMED / PENDING / HEDGED, so an action proceeds only on a verified claim and an unverifiable one is stated with its uncertainty attached; it tracks each claim's provenance through a neural-net model and classifies it by storage durability. The guide loop disciplines the need behind the claim — asking when it must, reusing what the user already configured, and recording both to an auditable ledger. Portable; no dependency on the Roboto instance.
